parameters.content:
## Multi-Platform Video Script Factory — GPT-4o-mini + Sheets + Gmail

For content creators, social media managers, and marketing agencies who need to repurpose one video topic into three platform-ready scripts without writing anything manually. Submit a single topic via the form and GPT-4o-mini generates all three scripts in one API call — a structured 700–900 word YouTube long-form script, a fast-paced 100–130 word Instagram Reels script with visual cues in brackets, and a punchy 50–70 word TikTok script that ends with a comment question. Each script includes a hook, full spoken script, platform-specific CTA, and 8 hashtags. All three rows are logged to Google Sheets and delivered to your inbox in one email.

## How it works
- **1. Form — Multi-Platform Video Topic** collects video topic, target audience, niche, tone of voice, and your name
- **2. Set — Config Values** stores Sheet ID, recipient email, sender name, and all form values
- **3. AI Agent — Write 3 Platform Scripts** uses GPT-4o-mini at temperature 0.7 to generate all 3 scripts in one call: YouTube (700–900 words), Instagram Reels (100–130 words with visual cues), TikTok (50–70 words, ends with question)
- **6. Code — Split Scripts for Sheets** extracts the 3 platform objects into one item each, marks isLastRow on TikTok, carries allScripts on the last item only
- **7. Google Sheets — Log Video Scripts** appends one row per platform — 3 rows per run
- **8. IF — All Scripts Logged?** gates the Gmail send so it fires exactly once after all 3 rows are saved
- **9. Code — Build Email** reads allScripts from the last item and builds one structured plain text email with all 3 scripts
- **10. Gmail — Send Scripts Email** delivers all 3 scripts in one message ready to copy and record

## Set up steps
1. In **2. Set — Config Values** — replace PASTE_YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID_HERE, PASTE_YOUR_EMAIL_HERE, and PASTE_YOUR_NAME_HERE
2. In **4. OpenAI — GPT-4o-mini Model** — connect your OpenAI credential
3. In **7. Google Sheets — Log Video Scripts** — connect your Google Sheets OAuth2 credential
4. In **10. Gmail — Send Scripts Email** — connect your Gmail OAuth2 credential
5. Create a Google Sheet tab named Video Scripts with columns: Date, Topic, Platform, Script Length, Hook, Script, CTA, Tags, Submitted By

## Form Input and Config
User submits one video topic with target audience, niche, and optional tone. Config stores Sheet ID, email, sender name, and all form values. Niche and tone personalize all three platform scripts.

## AI Script Generation — All 3 Platforms
One GPT-4o-mini call generates all 3 scripts simultaneously. YouTube: 700–900 words, structured with intro, 3 main points, conclusion. Instagram Reels: 100–130 words, fast-paced, visual cues in brackets. TikTok: 50–70 words, one idea, punchy, ends with comment question. Structured Output Parser enforces the nested 3-platform schema.

nodes.name: Section — Script Split, Sheet Logging, and Email Delivery

parameters.content:
## Script Split, Sheet Logging, and Email Delivery
Splits the 3 scripts to one item per platform. Google Sheets logs all 3 rows. The IF node gates the email so it fires exactly once after all rows are saved — on the TikTok item (isLastRow). Build Email reads allScripts from the last item and assembles the full 3-script email.

values.placeholder: Example: 5 ways to get more clients as a law firm using SEO
Example: law firm owners, medical spa owners, SaaS founders
Example: legal marketing, health and wellness, B2B SaaS

parameters.formDescription: One topic. Three scripts. YouTube long form, Instagram Reels, and TikTok — all written and ready to record.

parameters.text:
=You are a professional video scriptwriter for social media content creators.

Write scripts for exactly 3 platforms from this one topic.

Topic: {{ $json.videoTopic }}
Audience: {{ $json.targetAudience }}
Niche: {{ $json.niche }}
Tone: {{ $json.toneOfVoice }}

Return ONLY a valid JSON object. No extra text. No markdown. No backticks.

The JSON must have exactly 3 keys: youtube, reels, tiktok

Each key must have exactly these fields:

hook
The opening line or sentence. Under 20 words. Must grab attention immediately.

script
The full spoken script for this platform. Plain text only. No bullet points. No markdown.
For youtube: 700 to 900 words. Structured with intro, 3 main points, and conclusion.
For reels: 100 to 130 words. Fast paced. Visual cues in brackets like [hold up phone] when helpful.
For tiktok: 50 to 70 words. One idea only. Punchy and direct. End with one question for comments.

cta
Call to action for this specific platform. One sentence.
For youtube: ask to subscribe and comment.
For reels: ask to save and follow.
For tiktok: ask to follow for more.

tags
Array of 8 hashtag strings relevant to this platform and niche. Include the # symbol. Mix broad and niche tags.

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $('6. Code — Split Scripts for Sheets').item.json;
const scripts = data.allScripts;

const yt = scripts.youtube;
const reels = scripts.reels;
const tiktok = scripts.tiktok;

const emailBody =
  'Hello ' + data.senderName + ',

' +
  'Your 3 platform-ready video scripts are ready.

' +
  'Topic: ' + data.videoTopic + '
' +
  'Audience: ' + data.targetAudience + '
' +
  'Niche: ' + data.niche + '
' +
  'Date: ' + data.today + '

' +

  '============================================================
' +
  'YOUTUBE — Long Form (8 to 10 minutes)
' +
  '============================================================

' +
  'Hook:
' + yt.hook + '

' +
  'Script:
' + yt.script + '

' +
  'CTA: ' + yt.cta + '

' +
  'Tags: ' + (yt.tags || []).join(' ') + '

' +

  '============================================================
' +
  'INSTAGRAM REELS — Short Form (60 seconds)
' +
  '============================================================

' +
  'Hook:
' + reels.hook + '

' +
  'Script:
' + reels.script + '

' +
  'CTA: ' + reels.cta + '

' +
  'Tags: ' + (reels.tags || []).join(' ') + '

' +

  '============================================================
' +
  'TIKTOK — Short Form (30 seconds)
' +
  '============================================================

' +
  'Hook:
' + tiktok.hook + '

' +
  'Script:
' + tiktok.script + '

' +
  'CTA: ' + tiktok.cta + '

' +
  'Tags: ' + (tiktok.tags || []).join(' ') + '

' +

  'All 3 scripts are also saved in your Google Sheets Video Scripts tab.

' +
  'Best regards,
' + data.senderName;

return [{
  json: {
    emailSubject: '3 Video Scripts Ready — ' + data.videoTopic + ' — ' + data.today,
    emailBody,
    recipientEmail: data.recipientEmail
  }
}];

assignments.name: result
assignments.value: Script logged — more rows being saved to Sheets.
